items.name: reADHD
items.description: 为 ADHD 人群设计的 Obsidian 仿生阅读插件，支持中文智能分词（jieba-wasm）。基于 Boninall 的 Obsidian-Better-Reading-Mode 改进。

items.name: autotextdesign
items.description: 书法字体制作器 - 将手写字体图片转换为可使用的TTF字体文件

items.name: SatFix
items.description: SatFix resets the internal heal timer every tick via NMS so that exhaustion penalty never applies. Saturation drains at the same rate regardless of health.

items.name: Anthony-Ray-Stevenson-
items.description: To upgrade the all line checks to all words check and check all subjects of the application. Like name, birthday, account numbers, date and time SSN, id, phone number, email and to triple Creek all documents and hit the minimize window button to see if anything shrinks or go to the start bar line and if so have it undo what'sCoveringUpTrueDocument

items.name: awesome-proxy
items.description: The definitive, ever-growing resource for proxy servers, routing tools, and client libraries. Built to change how developers handle large-scale network requests.
